name: Cricket
description: Acoustic encoding intelligence — stridulation produces species-specific chirp patterns by scraping wing file against plectrum at frequencies carrying mathematical temperature data (Dolbear's Law: count chirps in 14 seconds, add 40 = Fahrenheit). Phonotaxis enables females to navigate purely by sound gradient to locate males. Tympanic membrane on front legs provides directional hearing with inter-leg phase comparison. A living thermometer and acoustic beacon.

core_attributes.neurology: tibial tympanic organs, stridulation motor pattern generator, phonotactic circuits
core_attributes.pattern: stridulation encoding, phonotactic navigation, temperature-frequency coupling
